params._allocationManager: the real EigenLayer AllocationManager (or                            mock with the same SlashingParams ABI)
params.strategies: strategies to slash; cannot be empty

AdapterSlashed(address,uint256,bytes32,u.notice: Emitted whenever the adapter forwards a slash to AllocationManager.

allocationManager().notice: The real EigenLayer AllocationManager (or a fork-compatible mock).

operatorSetId().notice: The AVS's operator-set id (per EigenLayer v2 AVS registration).

slash(address,uint256,bytes32).notice: ISlasher.slash entry point — called by MimirValidationRegistry. Translates Mimir's (operator, wadSlashed, reasonHash) tuple into an EigenLayer v2 SlashingParams struct with:   - the same operator   - this adapter's pinned operatorSetId + strategies   - wadsToSlash = [wadSlashed, wadSlashed, ...] (one entry per strategy,     all equal)   - description = hex-string of reasonHash (32 bytes → 66-char string)

strategies().notice: Read-only view of the strategies this adapter slashes against.

totalSlashed(address).notice: View: how much of `operator`'s allocation has been slashed         cumulatively (sum of wadSlashed across all slash() calls).

userdoc.notice: Implements Mimir's ISlasher by translating to EigenLayer v2's         AllocationManager.slash(SlashingParams).
